Class AcuwaveDataRetrievalService

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.services.AbstractDataRetrievalService
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.services.AcuwaveDataRetrievalService
All Implemented Interfaces:
DataRetrievalService
public class AcuwaveDataRetrievalService extends AbstractDataRetrievalService
All methods to retrieve the data necessary for the corona dashboard from an Acuwave server.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class AbstractDataRetrievalService

    encounterIds, locationIds, patientIds

  • Method Details

    • getObservations

      public List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Observation> getObservations(DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiObservation resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR observation resources that include a covid finding.

    • getObservations

      public List<MiiObservation> getObservations(Collection<MiiEncounter> encounters, DataItemContext dataItemContext, List<String> loincCodes, QualitativeLabCodesSettings qualitativeLabCodesSettings) throws org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiObservation resources via encounter resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.
      Throws:
      org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException

    • getConditions

      public List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Condition> getConditions(DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiCondition resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.

    • getConditions

      public List<MiiCondition> getConditions(Collection<MiiEncounter> encounters, DataItemContext dataItemContext) throws org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException, OutOfMemoryError
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiCondition resources via encounter resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.
      Throws:
      org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException
      OutOfMemoryError

    • getPatients

      public List<MiiPatient> getPatients(List<MiiObservation> ukbObservations, List<MiiCondition> ukbConditions, DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiPatient resources.
      Parameters:
      ukbObservations - A list of all FHIR observation resources that include a covid finding.
      ukbConditions - A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.
      Returns:
      A list of all patient resources that have at least one covid observation and/or covid diagnosis.

    • getPatients

      public List<MiiPatient> getPatients(Integer maxAgeAtCutOffDate, DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of MiiPatient resources that are younger than the specified age at the start of the reference date.
      Parameters:
      maxAgeAtCutOffDate - Maximum age in years at cut-off-date.
      Returns:
      A list of all valid patient resources that fulfil the criteria.

    • getPatients

      public List<MiiPatient> getPatients(List<MiiProcedure> ukbProcedures, List<MiiCondition> ukbConditions)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiPatient resources.
      Parameters:
      ukbProcedures - A list of all FHIR procedure resources that are concerned within the given context
      ukbConditions - A list of all FHIR condition resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all patient resources that have at least one positive inclusion criteria.

    • getEncounters

      public List<MiiEncounter> getEncounters(DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiEncounter resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR encounter resources of the detected patients after a specified cut-off date.

    • getEncounters

      public List<MiiEncounter> getEncounters(DataItemContext dataItemContext, List<MiiPatient> patients)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiEncounter resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR encounter resources of the detected patients after a specified cut-off date.

    • getEncounters

      public List<MiiEncounter> getEncounters(PidTimestampCohortMap pidTimestampMap)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiEncounter resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR encounter resources of the detected patients after a specified cut-off date.

    • getProcedures

      public List<MiiProcedure> getProcedures(DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiProcedure resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR procedure resources that contain artificial ventilation data for patients with at least one covid observation and/or covid diagnosis.

    • getProcedures

      public List<MiiProcedure> getProcedures(Collection<MiiEncounter> encounters, DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiProcedure resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR procedure resources that contain artificial ventilation data for patients with at least one covid observation and/or covid diagnosis.

    • getProcedures

      public List<MiiProcedure> getProcedures(Collection<MiiEncounter> encounters, DataItemContext dataItemContext, Boolean activeEncountersOnly)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiProcedure ventilation resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR procedure resources that contain artificial ventilation data.

    • getProcedures

      public List<MiiProcedure> getProcedures(List<MiiEncounter> miiEncounters, List<MiiLocation> listMiiLocations, List<MiiObservation> listUkbObservations, List<MiiCondition> listUkbConditions, DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiProcedure resources. The input resources are needed for a preprocessing filtering in the acuwave sided procedure data retrieval.
      Parameters:
      miiEncounters - A list of all FHIR encounter resources of the detected patients after a specified cut-off date.
      listMiiLocations - A list of all FHIR location resources that are referenced in any encounter resources.
      listUkbObservations - A list of all FHIR observation resources that include a covid finding.
      listUkbConditions - A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR procedure resources that contain artificial ventilation data for patients with at least one covid observation and/or covid diagnosis.

    • getLocations

      public List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Location> getLocations()
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiLocation resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR location resources.

    • getConsents

      public List<MiiConsent> getConsents(Collection<MiiEncounter> miiEncounters)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR broad and acribis consent resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR consent resources.

    • getConsents

      public List<MiiConsent> getConsents()
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR broad consent resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR consent resources.

    • getQuestionnaireResponses

      public List<MiiQuestionnaireResponse> getQuestionnaireResponses(List<String> patientIds)
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiQuestionnaireResponse ventilation resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR questionnaire response resources that are used to gather acribis follow-up information.

    • getServerType

      public final ServerTypeEnum getServerType()
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      Retrieval of the used server type.
      Returns:
      The used server type of the data retrieval service (e.g. ServerTypeEnum.FHIR)

    • getBatchSize

      public int getBatchSize()
      Description copied from interface: DataRetrievalService
      Retrieval of the used batch size defined in the FhirSearchConfiguration class.
      Returns:
      The configured batch size of the parallelized partial FHIR searches

    • getIcuEncounters

      public List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter> getIcuEncounters() throws SearchException
      Throws:
      SearchException

    • getIcuEpisodes

      public List<CoreBaseDataItem> getIcuEpisodes(Collection<String> caseIds) throws SearchException
      Returns a list of ICU episodes for the specified case IDs.
      Parameters:
      caseIds - A collection of case ids that are used to query data from the acuwave server.
      Returns:
      A list of ICU episodes
      Throws:
      SearchException
